ACME CORP Q3 2024 EARNINGS CALL TRANSCRIPT — MD&A EXCERPT

Management's Discussion and Analysis

CEO Remarks:

We are pleased to report strong momentum across our core business lines.
Demand for our datacenter power solutions remains robust and we are well-positioned
to capture significant growth opportunities over the next twelve months.

Looking ahead, we remain confident in our ability to expand margins and improve
operating cash flow generation. Our capital allocation strategy continues to
prioritize high-return investments, and we expect to deliver positive outcomes
for all stakeholders.

CFO Remarks:

While we acknowledge the current macroeconomic environment, we do NOT see strong
demand destruction in our key markets. We are cautious about near-term headwinds
from rising input costs, but our hedging program provides meaningful protection.

Our forward-looking outlook reflects both the opportunities and the uncertainties
inherent in the current environment. We anticipate cautious sequential improvement
in the second half of the year.

END OF MD&A EXCERPT
